message:
chore(beads): close br-r37-c1-bj91d (random_uniform_k_out_graph + RCM + flow_matrix_row)

Shipped in e3f2e78. Three nx utilities now wrapped via the existing
_call_networkx_submodule_for_parity helper:

- random_uniform_k_out_graph(n, k, ...) from generators.directed —
  k-out random digraph constructor.
- reverse_cuthill_mckee_ordering(G, heuristic=None) from utils —
  bandwidth reduction node ordering.
- flow_matrix_row(G, weight=None, dtype=float, solver=lu) from
  algorithms.centrality.flow_matrix — current-flow centrality kernel.

Verification recorded in close_reason:
- random_uniform_k_out_graph: n=8 k=2 seed=42 — nodes/edges match nx
- reverse_cuthill_mckee_ordering: P8 — RCM ordering matches nx
- flow_matrix_row: K4 — row count matches nx

Status flips from in_progress to closed; routine beads sync, no code
change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
